case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. BEVERLY, RON et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BEVERLY, RON

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-16-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-23-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT BEVERLY, RON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

JUDGE DONALDSON, MLYON,REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK 10:42AM C/C FOR JURY; ALL PARTIES PRESENT, MICHAEL ROSSOFF ATTY FOR PLTF; RON BEVERLY DEFT IN PRO PER; CASE SETTLED; STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ INTO RE- CORD. IF DEFT VACATES PREMISES LOCATED AT 216 EDDY ST, #405 BY MIDNIGHT ON 8/31/97 PLTF WAIVES ALL RENTS AND DAMAGES; DEFT MAY STORE HIS PERSONAL PROPERTY ON SAID PREMISES IN BASEMENT FOR FREE UNTIL 10/31/97; DEFT ONLY OCCUPANT; PLTF MAY RETAIN SECURITY DEP; LEASE AGREE FORFEITED; IF DEFT VAC. IN TIMELY MANNER PLTF WILL FILE A DISM OF ACTION, IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE PREMISES, UPON 24HRS NOTICE PLTF MAY FILE NOTICE W/COURT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR RENTS/DAMAGES/ATTY FEES; MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL LIABILTY ON EACH SIDE.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT BEVERLY, RON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEVERLY, RON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY ST, #405, SF,CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT PROPERTY MAY BE STORED FREE OF CHARGE ON PREMISES UNTIL 10/31/97.
